definitions: An abbreviation for Neural Machine Translation, a machine translation approach that uses a large neural network to predict the likelihood of a sequence of words, typically modeling entire sentences in a single integrated model.
An abbreviation for Neuromuscular Transmission or Neuromuscular Transducer.
examples: The latest advancements in NMT have significantly improved translation quality.
Researchers are exploring new architectures for NMT.
Monitoring NMT is crucial during certain medical procedures.
